name: Condition Tracker
description: Track token conditions and custom effects as separate Roll20 Turn Tracker rows.

useroptions.name: useMarkers
useroptions.description: Apply Roll20 status markers to tokens when a condition is added. Default: enabled.

useroptions.name: useIcons
useroptions.description: Show short icon codes such as [G] instead of emoji in Turn Tracker rows. Default: disabled.

useroptions.name: subjectPromptBypass
useroptions.description: Skip the optional subject-token step for Spell, Ability, and Other effects. Default: disabled.

useroptions.name: healthBar
useroptions.description: Token bar to watch for 0 HP cleanup prompts. Default: bar1_value.

useroptions.name: language
useroptions.description: Output language for chat messages and the generated help handout. Supports Roll20 account languages; aliases en, zh, and pt are accepted in chat commands. Default: en-US.

useroptions.name: markerGrappled
useroptions.description: Status marker tag used for Grappled. Default: grab.

useroptions.name: markerRestrained
useroptions.description: Status marker tag used for Restrained. Default: padlock.

useroptions.name: markerProne
useroptions.description: Status marker tag used for Prone. Default: back-pain.

useroptions.name: markerPoisoned
useroptions.description: Status marker tag used for Poisoned. Default: chemical-bolt.

useroptions.name: markerStunned
useroptions.description: Status marker tag used for Stunned. Default: pummeled.

useroptions.name: markerBlinded
useroptions.description: Status marker tag used for Blinded. Default: bleeding-eye.

useroptions.name: markerCharmed
useroptions.description: Status marker tag used for Charmed. Default: chained-heart.

useroptions.name: markerFrightened
useroptions.description: Status marker tag used for Frightened. Default: screaming.

useroptions.name: markerIncapacitated
useroptions.description: Status marker tag used for Incapacitated. Default: interdiction.

useroptions.name: markerInvisible
useroptions.description: Status marker tag used for Invisible. Default: ninja-mask.

useroptions.name: markerParalyzed
useroptions.description: Status marker tag used for Paralyzed. Default: frozen-orb.

useroptions.name: markerPetrified
useroptions.description: Status marker tag used for Petrified. Default: fossil.

useroptions.name: markerUnconscious
useroptions.description: Status marker tag used for Unconscious. Default: sleepy.

useroptions.name: markerSpell
useroptions.description: Status marker tag used for Spell effects. Default: lightning-helix.

useroptions.name: markerAbility
useroptions.description: Status marker tag used for Ability effects. Default: fist.

useroptions.name: markerAdvantage
useroptions.description: Status marker tag used for Advantage effects. Default: three-leaves.

useroptions.name: markerDisadvantage
useroptions.description: Status marker tag used for Disadvantage effects. Default: broken-heart.
